description: You are an educational deployment coordinator analyzing Portuguese language grades from two high schools (GP and MS). Extract the dataset from /home/ga/Documents/student.zip into /home/ga/Documents/student_data/ and use the semicolon-delimited student-por.csv file to calculate the average final grade (G3 column) for students at each school ('GP' and 'MS'). Create and run a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/grade_analysis.py to perform this analysis and save the averages, rounded to at least one decimal place, to /home/ga/Documents/school_comparison.txt.
